knockout_fit.method: fit to historical knockout frequency bands (MODEL_IMPROVEMENTS 2.5); resolve_knockout-only, group predict_match unaffected
knockout_fit.note: ko_rho (draw-clustering) raises reach-ET at constant goals; mf is a modest ~7% goal cut to the ~2.4 KO level; ET caution lowered 0.85->0.50 for the shootout band. ko_rho capped at -0.20 for DC stability (residual ~2pp to 32% absorbed by the more-even real KO field). Forward-only / projection-only; no knockout games played yet to OOS-validate advance-prob calibration (the 2.5 validate-narrow half awaits stage-labeled data).
